excerpt: The official programme page for MSc/PgD in Global Supply Chain Management lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/44089-sfm-sfp-gpm-spp Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Please complete all of the relevant fields and enclose all necessary documents. Incomplete applications cannot be processed promptly.
